news.title: Roku hits a major milestone with 100 million users
news.snippet: Roku has surpassed 100 million users on its streaming devices and Roku TVs, almost 20 years after it was spun out of Netflix in 2008.

news.title: Roku is in ‘more than half’ of US homes, crosses 100 million milestone
news.snippet: Roku has hit a major milestone, with its platform now being used in 100 million households around the globe. In a post, Roku says that it has “surpassed 100...

news.title: Roku Hits 100 Million Streaming Households Worldwide
news.snippet: Roku has hit the milestone of reaching more than 100 million streaming devices worldwide.

news.title: Roku (ROKU) Hits 100 Million Streaming Households, Showcases Gro

news.title: Roku Passes 100M Global Streaming Households
news.snippet: Roku said Thursday it has passed 100 million global streaming households. The company hit the milestone this month across connected devices and smart-TVs.
